property.name: 17477a69-d9a5-4251-9329-0963e8121b5f
property.value: ### Domain Interaction modeling rule (CRITICAL) - If a `Command`/`Query`/`Operation` is intended to interact with the persistence of a domain entity, then ALWAYS add the appropriate interaction associations (e.g. `Create Entity Action`, `Query Entity Action`, etc). - Always add interaction associations to the diagrams. - `Query Entity Action` represents a data-access query through the target Aggregate Root or Entity in the Domain. - Do NOT add multiple `Query Entity Action` associations from the same `Command`/`Query`/`Operation` to multiple Domain entities just to express joins/navigation/projection needs. - Only model `Query Entity Action` associations for aggregate roots that the handler directly queries via their repository.
